choices.text: Checkpointer + thread_id. SqliteSaver/PostgresSaver saves state at each node execution. thread_id identifies conversation. Resume via same thread_id; new starts new. Plus time travel (view past states), state editing (update externally for human intervention).

PostgresSaver. SqliteSaver fine for dev / single-machine; doesn't scale to high concurrency or multi-server. PostgresSaver: handles concurrent reads/writes, multi-server deployments, durability, backups. MemorySaver = lost on restart (dev only). Redis = fast but ephemeral. For production with persistence requirements: PostgresSaver standard. Configure connection string; same API as other savers.
